cleaned_html_body:
Dear Team,

I noticed your recent imports of knitted apparel (HS 6110, 6101) and wanted to reach out. As a long-time supplier to US brands, Arooj Enterprises specializes in these categories with a capacity of 150,000 units/month.

We are ISO 14001, SEDEX, and OEKO-TEX certified, producing knitted and woven garments that align with your import profile. Our vertical integration ensures consistent quality, from yarn to finished goods, at competitive Pakistan pricing.

Unlike your current suppliers, we offer end-to-end control under one roof, eliminating middlemen and surprises.

I'd be happy to send samples and pricing—just let me know.

Best regards,
Asad Irfan | Senior Marketing Manager | Arooj Enterprises | www.texbase.com
